author: nextbound
description: Turn Canvas into a node-based AI generation pipeline for images, video, text, and audio. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Nextbound
manifest.description: Turn Canvas into a node-based AI generation pipeline for images, video, text, and audio.
manifest.name: Bragi Canvas

name: Bragi Canvas

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bragi Canvas 1.27.3.

What's fixed:
- Fixes SV NewAPI Seedance Auto duration by forwarding it as `metadata.duration = -1`.
- Matches direct BytePlus / Volcengine Ark Seedance Auto duration behavior.
- Adds static verification coverage for SV NewAPI video parameters.

Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bragi Canvas 1.27.2.

What's fixed:
- Fixes SV NewAPI Nano Banana Pro requests by forwarding the selected aspect ratio as APIMart-style `size`.
- Forwards the selected image size as the SV NewAPI `resolution` tier.
- Adds static verification coverage for the Banana Pro SV NewAPI payload shape.

Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bragi Canvas 1.27.1.

What's fixed:
- Routes the stable Bragi `gpt-image-2` model through APIMart's official upstream model ID.
- Keeps existing enabled-model settings and MCP usage stable while restoring official-channel quality handling.

Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bragi Canvas 1.27.0.

What's new:
- Adds GPT Image 2 (Official) as a selectable APIMart/SV NewAPI image model with quality-aware routing.
- Aligns SV NewAPI gateway model IDs across image, video, audio, and text models.
- Forwards SV NewAPI media generation parameters for Seedance and fal-routed video models.

What's fixed:
- Fixes SV NewAPI GPT Image 2 sizing/quality handling.
- Fixes SV NewAPI Seedream image sizing by reusing the Seedream-specific size map.

Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bragi Canvas 1.26.3.

What's fixed:
- Fixes canvas-scoped duplicate handling so duplicated nodes and generated assets stay associated with the correct canvas.
- Fixes reference thumbnail refresh behavior after duplicate and canvas operations.

Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bragi Canvas 1.26.2.

What's fixed:
- Fixes TokenRouter GPT Image edit requests so reference images are uploaded and routed correctly.
- Adds verification coverage for TokenRouter reference image upload handling.

Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bragi Canvas 1.26.1.

What's fixed:
- Fixes Obsidian review source warnings by typing the fflate stream callback used during .bragi ZIP import.
- Tightens Gemini Files API response parsing to avoid unsafe file/state response access.
- Tightens SV NewAPI gateway asset flow response parsing and error extraction without unsafe response access.

Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bragi Canvas 1.26.0.

What's new:
- Adds Kling V3 Motion Control mode for character image plus reference motion video generation on the native Kling provider.
- Adds APIMart support for Kling V3 Motion Control through the kling-v3-motion-control model path.
- Adds Motion Control UI handling, including automatic mode selection for one image plus one video, Orientation and Audio controls, and hidden duration/aspect ratio controls for this mode.

What's changed:
- Routes Kling Motion Control reference videos through the relay and polls the native /v1/videos/motion-control endpoint.

What's fixed:
- Scopes Kling 3.0 provider modes so fal, TokenRouter, and SV NewAPI do not expose Motion Control.

Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bragi Canvas 1.25.0.

What's new:
- Expands SV NewAPI reference media support so Seedance routes image, audio, and video refs through top-level gateway arrays for text-to-video, first-frame, image-ref, and video-ref modes.
- Enables SV NewAPI Grok video modes for text-to-video, image-ref, and video-extend flows.
- Adds SV NewAPI gateway asset registration via /v1/assets, including per-node cache validation, polling, asset:// reuse, and fallback when registration is unsupported.

What's changed:
- Generalizes SV NewAPI provider media upload handling across image, audio, and video refs while preserving HTTP(S) and asset:// refs when possible.

What's fixed:
- Sends SV NewAPI Seedance reference images through top-level images so the gateway can convert them into Ark content reference roles.

Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bragi Canvas 1.24.0.

What's new:
- Adds the provider integration standard: provider/model differences are declared in the catalog, including aggregated providers, editable API model IDs, provider-specific modes, parameter overrides, and reference-media delivery behavior.
- Adds centralized reference-media delivery with relay, inline, native asset, and passthrough strategies.
- Adds SV NewAPI as a configurable OpenAI-compatible gateway provider for existing text, image, video, and audio catalog models.
- Adds catalog validation and audit tooling for provider/model/mode/reference delivery rules.

What's changed:
- Merges Wan 2.7 provider variants into the unified wan-2.7 model with provider-effective modes and settings migration.

What's fixed:
- Uploads Gemini multimodal text references through the Gemini Files API instead of passing relay URLs to AI Studio.
- Moves Kling reference delivery to the shared relay delivery contract.

Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bragi Canvas 1.23.0.

What's new:
- Reworks .bragi export/import to use a streaming ZIP package format for large and asset-heavy canvases, while keeping legacy JSON package import compatibility.
- Adds an export confirmation modal with asset/package size stats, destination selection, and reveal-in-file-manager support.

What's changed:
- Changes ElevenLabs Sound Effects duration to a range control with provider-specific ElevenLabs and fal.ai limits, including clamped provider/MCP defaults.

What's fixed:
- Fixes merge import, large canvas export/import, and asset-heavy package handling so imported nodes repaint reliably and exports clean up partial files on failure.
- Clears Obsidian community review lint warnings and deprecated settings re-render self-calls.

Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bragi Canvas 1.22.0.

What's new:
- Adds DashScope Wan 2.7 video generation with text-to-video, image-to-video, reference-to-video, video extend, and video edit modes.
- Adds configurable DashScope native base URL support, including southeast workspace compatibility.
- Simplifies Wan 2.7 UI params and mode labels, including merging multi-image reference into Ref Image and fixing the Duration toolbar hover height.

What's fixed:
- Renders newly imported canvas nodes immediately after grid split, collage, and duplicate-with-connections flows.
- Makes image, text, and audio reference-strip drag state self-heal if a drag is cancelled or dropped outside the window.

Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bragi Canvas 1.21.3.

What's fixed:
- Sends TokenRouter text-generation relay video URLs as video_url content parts.
- Keeps non-video file references on the existing file content path for TokenRouter text generation.

Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bragi Canvas 1.21.2.

What's fixed:
- Skips the ModelArk and BytePlus asset moderation prefilter when creating reference assets for supported generation flows.
- Fixes reference asset uploads that could be rejected before the provider generation request started.

Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bragi Canvas 1.21.1.

This release was built by GitHub Actions from the tagged source commit.
Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bragi Canvas 1.21.0.

What's new:
- Added Seedream 5.0 Lite as an image model on Volcengine and BytePlus, with 2K, 3K, and 4K output options.
- Added BytePlus Seedream image generation through the international BytePlus ARK endpoint.
- Changed BytePlus asset handling to use an explicit reusable Asset group ID instead of creating asset groups automatically.
- Added per-provider API model ID overrides in the provider model management UI.
- Migrated legacy BytePlus byteplusProjectName values that look like asset group IDs into the new byteplusAssetGroupId setting.

Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bragi Canvas 1.20.0.

What's new:
- Added MuleRouter CarrotHub image models: Z-Image Spicy for text-to-image and Qwen Image Edit Spicy for image-ref-to-image.
- Added SuChuang as an optional provider for Omni-Flash-Ext, including async task submission, polling, Relay image reference routing, and final URL extraction.
- Added an inline video editing tool for trimming video nodes and capturing frames back onto the canvas.
- Improved inline tool layout with node-relative top and bottom toolbars, moving video capture and save controls into the top toolbar.
- Fixed MCP tool schemas so inputSchema is emitted with a top-level type: object.

Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bragi Canvas 1.19.1.

What's fixed:
- Fixed canvas inline annotation mode regressions introduced by the new image annotation tool.
- Improved inline tool session state handling, viewport focusing, toolbar suppression/reveal, and exit cleanup.
- Fixed annotation toolbar interactions for color dropdowns, pointer/focus scope, and native toolbar restoration.
- Adjusted node toolbar positioning and annotation CSS for inline tool mode.

Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bragi Canvas 1.19.0.

What's new:
- Added APIMart Omni-Flash-Ext as a video model with text-to-video, first-frame, multi-image-ref, and video-ref modes.
- Routed APIMart video reference images and videos through Bragi Relay before provider calls, avoiding raw data URIs and third-party source URLs.
- Normalized reference image upload preparation across APIMart, OpenAI-compatible, TokenRouter, and Token360 paths.
- Added reference image upload verification coverage.

Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bragi Canvas 1.18.0.

What's new:
- Added inline image annotation tools for canvas image nodes, with box, number, and mosaic markup plus undo/redo/save/exit controls.
- Fixed Token360 Seedance reference uploads for WebP images by validating image bytes, converting WebP uploads to PNG, and honoring API-level failure codes.
- Changed TokenRouter ModelArk Seedance refs to require an explicit Asset group ID; without one, local refs use temporary HTTPS URLs instead of implicit asset groups.
- Validated cached Seedance asset refs before reuse so stale TokenRouter, Token360, BytePlus, and Volcengine asset IDs are refreshed or reported clearly.
- Fixed the MCP StreamableHTTP worker listener and Node runtime resolution used inside Obsidian/Electron.

Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bragi Canvas 1.17.2.

## Added
- Token360 video provider.
- Token360 support for `seedance-2.0` and `seedance-2.0-fast`.
- Optional Token360 asset group uploads for RealFace / Virtual Portrait image references.

## Changed
- Token360 local image, audio, and video references use Bragi temporary HTTPS URLs when asset upload is not configured.
- Seedance reference-video provider checks and error messaging now include Token360.

Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bragi Canvas 1.17.1.

## Added
- MuleRouter video provider.
- Wan 2.7 Spicy I2V as an explicit opt-in video model.

## Changed
- MuleRouter image and audio references are routed through Bragi temporary relay URLs before provider calls.
- The new model preserves explicit provider-model connection semantics: it is addable, but it is not auto-enabled for existing users.

Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bragi Canvas 1.17.0.

## Added
- Update reminder modal: checks the latest GitHub release when a canvas is opened or activated, then prompts users when a newer release is available.
- Manual command: `Bragi Canvas: Check for updates`.
- Update-check verification script covering version comparison, cache TTL, and reminder suppression behavior.
- Explicit provider-model connection preferences.
- Centralized settings migration pipeline.

## Changed
- Add Provider is now a transactional two-step flow: credentials are only persisted after selected models are connected.
- Add Model, Manage Models, Remove Provider, MCP `list_models`, and the generate bar now respect explicit provider-model connections.
- Provider/model settings empty states and row layouts were polished.
- README documents the GitHub release update-check request and its privacy boundary.

Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bragi Canvas 1.16.0.

## Added
- Image collage composition for multi-selected image nodes, creating a composed PNG node and source edges.
- TokenRouter ModelArk asset flow for Seedance reference media, including asset group creation, upload, review polling, and cached `asset://` references.
- Provider-scoped Seedance asset IDs for TokenRouter, BytePlus, and Volcengine, with MCP `set_asset_id` support for the provider namespace.
- ElevenLabs voice cloning from upstream audio references, plus stability, similarity, style, and speed controls for ElevenLabs TTS.
- MiniMax voice cloning from upstream audio references.
- Improved range and number parameter controls in the generate bar.

## Fixed
- GPT Image 2 sizing now maps selected aspect ratio and image tier to explicit OpenAI-compatible sizes.

Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: simonbntt
releases.description:
Bragi Canvas 1.14.3.

Changes:
- Added APIMart GPT-5.5 text provider support.
- Added Gemini 3.5 Flash text generation via Google Gemini and TokenRouter.
- Added Gemini multimodal text references for upstream video, audio, and PDF inputs.
- Split MCP tool registration into a dedicated registry module.
- Fixed Gemini text errors so Google quota and API-key details surface clearly.

Release assets:
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:

This release was built by GitHub Actions from the tagged source commit.
Release assets:

- main.js
- styles.css

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Bragi Canvas 1.14.0.

## Changes

- Added a unified `Qwen Voice` model entry that routes internally between built-in Qwen TTS, voice reference synthesis, and voice design synthesis.
- Added `Design` as a voice source mode. It uses an upstream text node as the voice design prompt while keeping the current node text as the spoken script.
- Renamed the custom voice source UI to `Voice ref` and kept it separate from `Design`.
- Added DashScope voice design support for Qwen Voice and CosyVoice, including custom voice metadata stored as `bragiCustomVoices`.
- Removed the separate user-facing Qwen Flash / Qwen VC / Qwen Instruct model entries in favor of the single Qwen Voice entry.
- Kept the Qwen built-in voice picker wired to the existing Instruct Flash sample list.
- Updated MCP generation to preserve voice source parameters such as `voiceMode` and `voiceDesignTextIndex`.
- Bumped the plugin version to `1.14.0`.

## Release assets

- `manifest.json`
- `main.js`
- `styles.css`
